root.rep_text: หนังสือยืนยันยอด

data_date.text: หุ้น ณ วันที่

root.sql:
select 'This is to certify that '||trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name_eng(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no))||' one of our customers,' as paragraph_1 , ' has an amount of '||REPLACE(to_snumber(pka_com_function.fp_shr_get_balance_atdate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!data_date!' )), RIGHT(to_snumber(pka_com_function.fp_shr_get_balance_atdate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!data_date!' )),3),null)||' in baht currency as a stockholder of' as paragraph_2 , ' Teachers’ Saving Co-operative of the General Education Department Ltd. This amount of shares' as paragraph_3 , ' stated above can be converted and withdrawn into cash immediately upon request from the member.' as paragraph_4 , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_shr_get_balance_atdate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!data_date!' )as share_mem , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!data_date!','SD')as day , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!data_date!','MM')as month , pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name(pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!data_date!','MM'),'LE')as month_eng , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!data_date!','YYYY')-543 as year , '!data_date!'as data_date , '!book_no!'as book_no , (select trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name_eng(membership_no)) from sc_hr_off_member where sc_hr_off_member.official_position = '008' )as manager_name_eng , sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_cnt_m_coop
where 1=1 and pka_com_function.fp_shr_get_balance_atdate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!data_date!' ) > 0 --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '039660' /*WHERE*/
